forms.title: Working Formal Study Plan Form
forms.content: Form required to apply for graduation the first term of your graduate degree to advance to candidacy.

forms.title: Request for Degree Evaluation Form
forms.content: Request for an evaluation of your degree progress to determine if you are ready to graduate.

forms.title: Culminating Experience Form
forms.content: Approval by graduate advisor and thesis committee for your culminating experience (thesis or project) to be completed in the final term of your graduate degree.

forms.title: Commencement Ceremony Request Form
forms.content: Request to participate in the commencement ceremony for your graduation to ensure your name is included.
